summary: Full scene flow audit of the active game path and all .tscn files. 7 findings (2 CRITICAL, 2 HIGH, 3 MEDIUM).

active_flow_verified.EndRunScreen: FAIL — not in active path, only referenced by dead GameFlowController

findings.title: GameFlowController never instantiated — dead code
findings.detail: scripts/core/game_flow_controller.gd defines a full game loop (Menu→HubScreen→Run3D→EndScreen) but is NEVER instantiated in any active scene, autoload, or script. Director q-20260414-004 explicitly said 'Migrer le chemin actif vers game_flow_controller'. Active path still uses HubAntre+BroceliandeForest3D directly.
findings.impact: Entire GameFlowController system (HubScreen.tscn, Run3D.tscn, EndRunScreen.tscn) is unreachable. Director directive not yet applied.

findings.title: EndRunScreen.tscn never shown after run completion
findings.detail: BroceliandeForest3D transitions directly to HubAntre.tscn after run end (scripts/broceliande_3d/broceliande_forest_3d.gd:1215). EndRunScreen.tscn (narrative ending, journey map, rewards, faction choice) is completely bypassed. Players never see end-of-run rewards.
findings.impact: Missing end-of-run UI. Run rewards, narrative endings, faction choice all inaccessible to player.

findings.title: Orphan scenes IntroPersonalityQuiz + SceneRencontreMerlin not yet deleted
findings.detail: Director q-20260414-005 said 'Supprimer IntroPersonalityQuiz + SceneRencontreMerlin'. Task E2E-DELETE-ORPHAN-SCENES is pending. 10 files to remove: 2 .tscn, 1 .uidren, 5 .gd scripts (+ quiz_data.gd, rencontre_dialogue.gd, rencontre_llm.gd), 2 .uid files. No external references confirmed.
findings.impact: Dead code bloat, confusing for future development.

findings.title: BroceliandeForest3D dual destination — HubAntre OR MerlinGame ambiguity
findings.detail: scripts/broceliande_3d/broceliande_forest_3d.gd:9 defines GAME_SCENE='res://scenes/MerlinGame.tscn' and line 1221 mentions going to MerlinGame, but line 1215 explicitly goes to HubAntre. The signal merlin_encounter_complete at line 6 references MerlinGame. Unclear which path fires when.
findings.impact: Potential softlock or wrong scene if merlin_encounter logic fires.

findings.title: MenuPrincipal.tscn not in active flow (superseded by Menu3DPC.tscn)
findings.detail: IntroCeltOS goes to Menu3DPC.tscn (scripts/IntroCeltOS.gd:516). MenuPrincipal.tscn is only reached via ui_overlay_narrative.gd (emergency return to menu). scripts/MenuPrincipalMerlin.gd is a full implementation that's mostly bypassed.
findings.impact: Dead code confusion. MenuPrincipalMerlin.gd receives maintenance but isn't on main path.

findings.title: Run3D.tscn only referenced by dead GameFlowController
findings.detail: scenes/Run3D.tscn uses scripts/run/run_3d_controller.gd. This scene is only in SCENE_RUN constant of GameFlowController (dead code). The actual run is BroceliandeForest3D.tscn.
findings.impact: Dead scene. Run3DController code (signals, lifecycle) is never executed in production.

findings.title: TransitionBiome.tscn exists but never called in active path
findings.detail: scenes/TransitionBiome.tscn has NEXT_SCENE=BroceliandeForest3D.tscn in scripts/TransitionBiome.gd:17 but no script in the active path calls it. It may have been superseded by PixelTransition.
findings.impact: Orphan scene. If it was intended as a biome transition overlay, it's never shown.

invariants_checked.all_active_tscn_exist: PASS — IntroCeltOS, Menu3DPC, ParchmentPreRun, BroceliandeForest3D, HubAntre all confirmed on disk
invariants_checked.pixel_transition_wired: PASS — autoload PixelTransition confirmed in scripts/autoload/pixel_transition.gd
invariants_checked.no_cyclic_deadlock: PASS — HubAntre→Forest→HubAntre loop is intentional (run cycle)
invariants_checked.endrun_screen_accessible: FAIL — EndRunScreen.tscn exists but unreachable from active path
